decision.summary: Hold the near-certain April 9 73k reach position to resolution and open the weekly 74k reach market.
decision.rationale: The live April 9 73k Yes position is already at 99.95% and Binance has printed a 24h high of 73145.0, so the outcome is effectively resolved in our favor and can be held to natural settlement instead of taking profit early. The latest 2026-04-09 Beecthor transcript and summary keep the active short-term thesis bullish toward 73.8k-74k before renewed downside, and Binance still confirms that upside remains live with BTC at 71782.19 after already tagging above 73k. With the daily slot effectively occupied by the resolving 73k position, the nearest reasonable weekly upside target is the April 6-12 74k reach market; at 36.5% it is below the preferred band but still acceptable under the playbook’s soft filter because the thesis is current, clear, and aligned.

validation.message: Nearest-strike-first rule rejected the proposed market

details.rejected: Nearest-strike-first rule rejected the proposed market
